title.en: Africa's World Cup success leaves Asia looking for answers
title.zh-CN: 非洲世界杯的成功让亚洲寻找答案

summary.en: The 2026 World Cup has been an amazing story for African football - while Asia has been left to reflect on failure.
summary.zh-CN: 2026年世界杯对非洲足球来说是一个令人惊叹的故事，而亚洲则需要反思失败。

title.en: 'Terrible decision' - Germany have goal controversially disallowed by VAR
title.zh-CN: “糟糕的决定” -德国的目标被VAR有争议地禁止

summary.en: Germany's Jonathan Tah has an extra-time goal controversially disallowed by VAR for a foul by Waldemar Anton on Paraguay goalkeeper Orlando Gill.
summary.zh-CN: 德国的乔纳森·塔（ Jonathan Tah ）有一个加时赛进球，但由于瓦尔德马·安东（ Waldemar Anton ）对巴拉圭守门员奥兰多·吉尔（ Orlando Gill ）犯规， VAR有争议地

title.en: Martinelli scores stoppage-time winner to send Brazil through to last 16
title.zh-CN: 马蒂内利得分停赛时获胜者，将巴西队送到最后16名

summary.en: Gabriel Martinelli scores a dramatic 95th-minute winner with Brazil coming from behind to beat Japan, set up a World Cup last-16 tie against Norway or Ivory Coast.
summary.zh-CN: 加布里埃尔·马蒂内利（ Gabriel Martinelli ）以戏剧性的第95分钟获胜，巴西队从后面击败日本队，与挪威队或科特迪瓦队并列世界杯16强。

title.en: 'Brilliant finish' - but should Sano have been on the pitch?
title.zh-CN: “精彩的完成” -但佐野应该在球场上吗？

summary.en: Kaishu Sano gives Japan the lead over Brazil moments after escaping a second yellow card for a challenge on Matheus Cunha during their round of 32 game in Houston.
summary.zh-CN: Kaishu Sano在休斯顿的32轮比赛中逃脱了第二张黄牌，在Matheus Cunha的挑战之后，日本队领先于巴西队。

title.en: Kane will sign new Bayern deal - Tuesday's gossip
title.zh-CN: 凯恩将签署新的拜仁协议-周二的八卦

summary.en: Harry Kane will extend his Bayern Munich contract, Manchester City plan major rebuild, while Rayo Vallecano left-back Pep Chavarria is a target for Chelsea.
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）将延长他在拜仁慕尼黑的合同，曼城计划进行重大重建，而雷奥·瓦列卡诺（ Rayo Vallecano ）左后卫佩普·查瓦里亚（ Pep Chavarria ）是切尔西的目标。

title.en: Kerr joins NWSL side Gotham FC
title.zh-CN: 科尔加入NWSL高谭足球俱乐部

summary.en: Australian international Sam Kerr has joined Gotham FC on a four-year deal following her departure from Chelsea.
summary.zh-CN: 澳大利亚国脚山姆·克尔（ Sam Kerr ）在离开切尔西后加入了高谭市足球俱乐部，为期四年。

title.en: 'Big brother' Van Dijk key to Dutch World Cup dreams
title.zh-CN: “大哥”范迪克是荷兰世界杯梦想的关键

summary.en: France's World Cup winner Olivier Giroud explains why Netherlands defender Virgil van Dijk is still the main man for his national team.
summary.zh-CN: 法国世界杯冠军奥利维尔·吉鲁（ Olivier Giroud ）解释了为什么荷兰后卫维吉尔·范迪克（ Virgil van Dijk ）仍然是他国家队的主力。

title.en: Great stories, little jeopardy - does the new World Cup format work?
title.zh-CN: 精彩的故事，小小的危险--新的世界杯模式行得通吗？

summary.en: New format, new teams and fascinating storylines. But did the new World Cup group stage really work?
summary.zh-CN: 新格式、新团队和引人入胜的故事情节。但是，新的世界杯小组赛真的有效吗？

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 22
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星22号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: Martinelli scores late winner to send Brazil through
title.zh-CN: 马丁内利得分晚赢家，送巴西通过

summary.en: Gabriel Martinelli scores in the 96 minute to knock out Japan, and send Brazil into the round of 16.
summary.zh-CN: 加布里埃尔·马蒂内利（ Gabriel Martinelli ）在第96分钟淘汰日本，并让巴西进入16强。

title.en: World Cup exit leaves South Korean football in crisis
title.zh-CN: 世界杯退出使韩国足球陷入危机

summary.en: After crashing out of the World Cup, BBC Sport investigates the rise and fall of South Korean football.
summary.zh-CN: 退出世界杯后，英国广播公司体育台调查了韩国足球的兴衰。

title.en: Football Daily

summary.en: Former Chelsea & Spain captain Azpilicueta in conversation with Steve Crossman
summary.zh-CN: 前切尔西和西班牙队队长Azpilicueta与Steve Crossman对话

title.en: South Korea football coach quits as president calls for probe into World Cup loss
title.zh-CN: 韩国足球教练辞职，总统呼吁调查世界杯失利

summary.en: South Korea was eliminated after missing out on a spot among the eight best third-placed teams.
summary.zh-CN: 韩国队在八支最好的第三名球队中缺席后被淘汰出局。

title.en: Pampered, protected & primed - so why didn't Scotland players perform?
title.zh-CN: 宠爱、保护和引导-那么为什么苏格兰球员没有表现出色？

summary.en: Scotland's players got everything they asked for at this World Cup. So why did they not perform on the pitch in the US?
summary.zh-CN: 苏格兰的球员们在这届世界杯上得到了他们所要求的一切。那么，他们为什么不在美国的球场上表演呢？

title.en: 'Ferguson to assess Bologna future' - gossip
title.zh-CN: “弗格森评估博洛尼亚的未来” -流言蜚语

summary.en: Scotland's Lewis Ferguson reportedly told Bologna he will assess his future after the World Cup, while Wolfsburg are said to be closing in on Celtic-linked goalkeeper Tjark Ernst.
summary.zh-CN: 据报道，苏格兰的刘易斯·弗格森（ Lewis Ferguson ）告诉博洛尼亚，他将在世界杯后评估自己的未来，而据说沃尔夫斯堡（ Wolfsburg ）正在接近与凯尔特人有联系的门将蒂亚克·恩斯特（ Tjark Ernst ）。
